name: Stir-Fried Zucchini
recipeInstructions:
Preparation: 10 minutes Cooking: 8 minutes
.
1. Cut zucchini into 1/4-inch pieces.
2. In a 5-quart Dutch oven over high heat, in very hot salad oil, cook zucchini, stirring quickly and frequently (stir-frying) until well coated.
3. Add water, salt, and sugar. Reduce heat to medium-high; continue stir-frying for 7 to 8 minutes until tender-crisp.
